name: Ralph Edwards
description: Radio and television host and producer (1913–2005)
abstract: Ralph Livingstone Edwards (June 13, 1913 – November 16, 2005) was an American radio and television host, radio producer, and television producer, best known for his radio-TV game shows Truth or Consequences and reality documentary series This Is Your Life.

about_quotes.speaker: Eurreal Wilford "Little Brother" Montgomery
about_quotes.evidence: Ralph Edwards had the house band there. So they wanted a band just to play at animation time.

about_quotes.speaker: Nellie Lutcher
about_quotes.evidence: Ralph Edwards, who is a wonderful man... was instrumental in really getting me on the show
